title: Post-CAR T Relapse Mechanism Gap Public Task Queue v0

tasks.task_title: Add a second public source extraction for CAR T fitness, exhaustion, expansion, or persistence
public_deliverables: A source-specific mechanism extraction for a public source that maps CAR T fitness, exhaustion, expansion, or persistence signals to the existing mechanism group.
A short note distinguishing review-level mechanism framing from source-specific extraction facts.
An updated coverage report after the extraction record is added.
acceptance_checks: The new extraction uses the mechanism extraction schema and passes make validate.
The extraction preserves source_id, mechanism_group_id, measurement_term_ids, and clinical_use_boundary.
Review-article statements are not treated as cohort-level measurements unless the underlying source provides them.
Coverage counts are described only as public artifact coverage, not mechanism frequency or biological priority.
Completed in public follow-up PR for issue #15 using yue-2025-bcma-resistance-review-v0.
what_not_to_infer: Do not infer that CAR T exhaustion or persistence is the dominant relapse mechanism.
Do not compare CAR T products or recommend treatment sequencing.
Do not convert review-level categories into patient-specific relapse explanations.

tasks.task_title: Add the first public extraction for plasma-cell identity or lineage-state escape
public_deliverables: A first source-specific extraction for plasma-cell identity, lineage-state escape, or target-linked phenotype change after anti-BCMA therapy.
Explicit handling of peer-review status, model context, sample pairing, and measurement method.
An updated coverage report showing that the bucket has first-extraction coverage.
acceptance_checks: Preprint or preclinical status is preserved when present in the source record.
Identity-state labels are kept source-specific and are not harmonized across studies without an explicit mapping note.
BCMA-low, BCMA-retained, and alternate-target signals are separated when the source supports separation.
make validate passes after the extraction and coverage update.
Completed in public follow-up PR for issue #14.
what_not_to_infer: Do not infer clinical efficacy for any alternate target from identity-state evidence alone.
Do not treat a preprint or model-system result as clinical guidance.
Do not claim that lineage-state escape is frequent without denominator-backed evidence.

tasks.task_title: Add the first public extraction for disease burden, disease site, and high-risk context
public_deliverables: A first public extraction that captures disease-burden, disease-site, high-risk, prior-therapy, and eligibility-context fields for relapse-mechanism interpretation.
A field note separating context variables from direct biological relapse mechanisms.
An updated coverage report showing first-extraction coverage for the disease-burden/site/risk bucket.
acceptance_checks: Context fields are not treated as causal mechanisms unless the source explicitly supports that interpretation.
Trial-registry fields are labeled as registry context, not proof of efficacy, availability, eligibility, or safety.
Cytogenetic, extramedullary, prior-line, and prior-BCMA exposure fields preserve the source's definitions.
make validate passes after the extraction and coverage update.
Completed in public follow-up PR for issue #16 using tedder-bhutani-2025-disease-context-v0.
what_not_to_infer: Do not infer patient-specific risk from public registry or overview fields.
Do not recommend a trial or treatment based on eligibility or baseline-characteristic fields.
Do not rank relapse mechanisms until context extraction is more complete.

tasks.task_title: Add a second public source extraction for plasma-cell identity or lineage-state escape
public_deliverables: A second source-specific extraction for plasma-cell identity, lineage-state escape, or target-linked phenotype change.
A short note separating source-defined identity or lineage-state labels from harmonized cross-source biology.
An updated coverage report showing second-source coverage or a documented blocker if the selected source does not support the bucket.
acceptance_checks: The new extraction uses the mechanism extraction schema and passes make validate.
The extraction preserves peer-review status, source-defined labels, model or sample context, and measurement method.
BCMA-low, BCMA-retained, alternate-target, and lineage-state signals are separated only when the source supports separation.
Coverage counts remain public artifact coverage, not mechanism frequency or biological priority.
Completed with di-meo-2025-target-linked-phenotype-v0 as target-linked phenotype-field coverage.
what_not_to_infer: Do not infer clinical efficacy for any alternate target from identity-state evidence alone.
Do not treat preclinical, review, or preprint framing as clinical guidance.
Do not compare mechanisms across sources until extraction fields are aligned and reviewed.

tasks.task_title: Add a second public source extraction for disease burden, disease site, high-risk, prior-therapy, or registry context
public_deliverables: A second source-specific extraction for disease-burden, disease-site, high-risk, prior-therapy, or registry-context fields.
A field note identifying which fields are context labels rather than causal relapse mechanisms.
An updated coverage report showing second-source coverage or a documented blocker if the selected source only supports field definitions.
acceptance_checks: The new extraction uses the mechanism extraction schema and passes make validate.
Registry fields are labeled as registry context, not proof of efficacy, availability, eligibility, or safety.
Cytogenetic, extramedullary, prior-line, prior-BCMA exposure, and eligibility fields preserve the selected source's definitions.
Context fields are not treated as causal mechanisms unless the source explicitly supports that interpretation.
Completed with nci-pdq-2025-disease-context-v0; coverage now shows covered-for-v0-navigation for the disease-context bucket.
what_not_to_infer: Do not infer patient-specific risk from public registry or overview fields.
Do not recommend a trial or treatment based on eligibility or baseline-characteristic fields.
Do not rank relapse mechanisms from context-field coverage.

review_notes: Derived from under-covered buckets in post-car-t-relapse-mechanism-coverage-v0.
Tasks are contribution-ready extraction tasks, not evidence-strength rankings.
Each task is scoped to public sources and public artifact updates only.
Issue #16 adds first-extraction coverage for disease burden, disease site, high-risk, prior-therapy, and registry-context fields.
Step 12 adds ready second-source extraction tasks for the two remaining under-covered buckets rather than starting another extraction without a task.
Step 13 completes plasma-cell identity second-source coverage with di-meo-2025-target-linked-phenotype-v0.
Step 14 completes disease-burden, site, and high-risk context second-source coverage with nci-pdq-2025-disease-context-v0.
